confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete the rule "{keyword}"?
description: Route requests to a different model when prompts contain specific keywords.

dialog.addDescription: Configure a keyword routing rule. Requests that hit the keyword will be forwarded to the target model.
dialog.editDescription: Modify the routing rule configuration. Changes will automatically refresh the cache.
dialog.priorityHint: Lower values are evaluated first. Default is 0.

emptyState: No routing rules yet. Click 'Add Rule' in the top right to start configuration.

masterToggle.description: When enabled, requests that hit a keyword are routed to the configured target model
masterToggle.label: Enable Keyword Routing

section.description: Master switch for keyword-based model routing. The rules below only take effect while this switch is on.
section.title: Keyword Routing Switch

section.description: Rules are evaluated in priority order (lower first). The first matched rule rewrites the requested model before provider selection.
section.title: Routing Rules

title: Keyword Routing

validation.targetModelMaxLength: Target model must not exceed {max} characters
validation.sourceModelMaxLength: Source model must not exceed {max} characters
validation.createFailed: Failed to create keyword routing rule
validation.updateFailed: Failed to update keyword routing rule
validation.deleteFailed: Failed to delete keyword routing rule
